name: raging-bolt
flavor_texts: It's said to incinerate everything around it with lightning launched from its fur. Very little is known about this creature.
It bears resemblance to a Pokémon that became a hot topic for a short while after a paranormal magazine touted it as Raikou's ancestor.
text: Raging-bolt is the Paradox Pokémon. It is a electric and dragon-type Pokémon. Abilities: protosynthesis. Base stats — HP: 125, Attack: 73, Defense: 91, Sp. Atk: 137, Sp. Def: 89, Speed: 75. Evolution line: raging-bolt. Lore: It's said to incinerate everything around it with lightning launched from its fur. Very little is known about this creature. It bears resemblance to a Pokémon that became a hot topic for a short while after a paranormal magazine touted it as Raikou's ancestor.
